surfaces.name: technique-section-lift
surfaces.summary: Lifts stable source sections into bounded KAG-friendly section units without replacing authored markdown meaning.

surfaces.name: metadata-spine-projection
surfaces.summary: Projects bounded source metadata into a KAG-friendly identity and routing spine without replacing source meaning.

surfaces.name: bounded-relation-view
surfaces.summary: Lifts direct typed relations into bounded edge hints without implying full graph semantics.

surfaces.name: provenance-note-view
surfaces.summary: Lifts provenance-oriented note handles into bounded KAG surfaces that preserve source linkage.

surfaces.name: tos-text-chunk-map
surfaces.summary: Maps authored ToS texts into bounded chunk-level retrieval units with explicit source linkage.

surfaces.name: cross-source-node-projection
surfaces.summary: Creates a bounded cross-source node projection for later graph consumers while preserving source-first provenance.

surfaces.name: tos-retrieval-axis-surface
surfaces.summary: Returns bounded lineage, conflict, practice, and source handles as a bridge-ready retrieval surface for AoA consumers.

surfaces.name: counterpart-edge-view
surfaces.summary: Projects bounded non-identity counterpart edges from ToS concepts into selected AoA operational surfaces without granting graph sovereignty.
